source.title: Lisbon jazz bar, vinyl, late night

lisbon-jazz.title: A Lisbon Jazz Bar, After Eleven
lisbon-jazz.oneLiner: Oxblood velvet and the warm hiss of vinyl. A trumpet that knows it is being listened to.
lisbon-jazz.lighting: candlelight, table lamps, pools rather than wash
lisbon-jazz.spatial: low room, brick, small stage, twenty close seats

musicAnchor.referenceTrack: Miles Davis, Blue in Green, live
